name: @openparachute/surface-monorepo
description: Workspace root for parachute-surface — host module (@openparachute/surface) + shared client library (@openparachute/surface-client).

scripts.build: bun run --filter '@openparachute/surface-client' build && bun run --filter '@openparachute/account-client' build && bun run --filter '@openparachute/surface-render' build && bun run --filter '@openparachute/surface' build && bun run --filter '@openparachute/pebble-config' build && bun run --filter '@openparachute/doc-schema' build && bun run --filter '@openparachute/docs-editor' build && bun run --filter '@openparachute/meeting-ingest' build && bun run --filter '@openparachute/meeting-mcp' build
scripts.test: bun test packages/surface-host/src/ packages/surface-client/src/ packages/account-client/src/ packages/surface-server/src/ packages/pebble-config/src/ packages/doc-schema/src/ packages/docs-editor/server/ packages/meeting-ingest/server/ packages/meeting-mcp/server/ && bun run --filter "@openparachute/notes-ui" test && bun run --filter "@openparachute/surface-render" test
scripts.test:all: bun run test && cd web/admin && bun run test
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/surface-host && tsc --noEmit && cd ../surface-client && tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && cd ../account-client && tsc --noEmit && cd ../surface-server && tsc --noEmit && cd ../surface-render && tsc --noEmit && cd ../notes-ui && tsc -b --noEmit && cd ../pebble-config && tsc --noEmit && cd ../doc-schema && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && tsc -p tsconfig.codec.json && cd ../docs-editor && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.web.json && cd ../meeting-ingest && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.web.json && cd ../meeting-mcp && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.web.json
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run typecheck && bun run typecheck:admin
